title: Lava Rises Mods
description: Quick installation of all the required mods for Breath of Shadows, Lava Rises Event!
body:
## Overview

Includes the base mods required to play the BOS Lava Rises Event. (Every Saturday on the discord)

The goal of this modpack is to have credit all the mods used and have it one centralized location for ease of updating the mods.

This modpack was brought to you by [Breath of Shadows.](https://breathofshadows.com)
